final:
// // This module implements a three-input logic gate that outputs a LOW signal only when input A_N is LOW and either B or C is LOW. If A_N is HIGH and both B and C are HIGH, the output X will be HIGH. If any of A_N, B, or C are HIGH, the output will be indeterminate (X = 'x').
module top_module(
    input wire A_N,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB,
    output wire X
);assign X = (A_N == 1'b1) && (B == 1'b1) && (C == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 :
               (A_N == 1'b0) || (B == 1'b0) || (C == 1'b0) ? 1'b0 :
               1'bx;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a three-input logic gate that outputs a LOW signal only when input A_N is LOW and either B or C is LOW. If A_N is HIGH and both B and C are HIGH, the output X will be HIGH. If any of A_N, B, or C are HIGH, the output will be indeterminate (X = 'x').
